goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'theatre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'postcode', and 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
The train should 'leave after 11:00' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of theatre
Make sure you get phone number, postcode, and area
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should go to bishops stortford
The train should leave after 11:00 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID
